uiIssues: Empty input field with no label or placeholder
Links with no text or href
functionalIssues: Links with href set to javascript:void(0);
dataIssues: No data displayed for approved players
No data displayed for pending requests
uxIssues: Poor navigation with multiple links to same page
No clear distinction between different sections of the dashboard
criticalBugs: Potential security vulnerability with links to unknown destinations
summary: The dashboard has multiple UI, functional, and data issues that need to be addressed to improve user experience and functionality.
